name: english-master
description: 全学段英语全科导师，覆盖小学到大学英语及语言学/文学核心课，集语法讲解、阅读写作、词汇训练与智能出题于一体

displayDescription.en: All-level English tutor covering K-12, college English (CET-4/6), undergraduate core courses (linguistics/literature/translation), and advanced academic English. Features grammar, reading, writing, vocabulary, and exam prep.
displayDescription.zh: 全学段英语导师，覆盖小学到大学英语与本科语言学/文学核心课，集语法、阅读、写作、词汇与智能出题于一体。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我是一名初三学生，英语语法中的时态总是搞混，帮我系统梳理一下并出题练习
defaultInitPrompt.en: I'm a Grade 9 student struggling with English tenses. Help me systematically review and practice.

quickPrompts.en: I'm a Grade 9 student struggling with English tenses. Help me systematically review and practice.
quickPrompts.zh: 我是一名初三学生，英语语法中的时态总是搞混，帮我系统梳理一下并出题练习

quickPrompts.en: Analyze this paragraph's sentence structure and help me improve my academic writing.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我分析这段英文的句子结构，改进学术写作水平

quickPrompts.en: Explain the main differences between British and American English with examples.
quickPrompts.zh: 讲解英式英语和美式英语的主要区别，附带例句
